evals.prompt: Show me the curl commands to scrape a page with Firecrawl and search with Exa. I need the actual REST API endpoints and authentication headers.
evals.expected_output: Should load the api-reference skill (disable-model-invocation means it only loads on explicit request) and provide curl examples with correct endpoints (api.firecrawl.dev/v1/scrape, api.exa.ai/search), proper auth headers, and ${VAR} placeholders for API keys.
